summary: This page contains end-of-section exercises on the Dirac delta function, generalized functions, and basic signal operations. Problems ask students to evaluate delta-function integrals, sketch derivatives and integrals of signals from figures, prove properties such as evenness and scaling of the delta function, define the derivative of the delta distribution, and locate complex frequencies of exponential sinusoids in the complex plane.

figures.caption: Two plots, (a) and (b), showing signals over time. Plot (a) shows a signal f(t) with rectangular pulses. Plot (b) shows another signal with a step and several impulses.
